race.description: Bidgee Pumps & Irrigation Super Mdn Hcp
race.comment: MAGNUS MAXIMUS (1) three runs in have been encouraging and should have little trouble stretching out to the 1400m. Failed to give up when a tough third over 1200m at Swan Hill. Finds a winnable race and sure to be thereabouts. MANZOBEEL (12) comes back in trip and is due for a change of luck. Caught on a limb with a gritty second over 1600m at this track. Ugly map again and don't dismiss. CHIEF OF WAR (2) solid effort last start, beaten 1.5 lengths into third over 1400m at Albury. Capable of building on that performance. HEART BALM (10) fair effort last start when resuming, beaten 2.75 lengths into second over 1200m at Corowa. Fitter and has claims.
